step_rationale: NETosis-derived thromboinflammatory biomarker; neutrophil extracellular trap marker.
mechanism: Citrullinated histone H3 from neutrophil extracellular traps drives platelet activation and thrombus formation in STEMI.

references.title: Silent Myocardial Infarction Revisited: Immuno-metabolic Mechanisms, Multimodal Biomarkers, and Translational Diagnostics.
Double-stranded DNA enhances platelet activation, thrombosis, and myocardial injury via cyclic GMP-AMP synthase.
Anti-citrullinated histone H3 immunoglobulin G: new antibodies highly correlate with anti-neutrophil extracellular traps antibodies and thrombosis in antiphospholipid syndrome.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
